title: 皐月賞の後に・制覇と慧眼

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The Overlord is victorious! A tribute to my worthy
foe for a riveting competition! A tribute to my
fans for an outstanding ovation!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
However... this ruler who vies to become the
Centurial Overlord must remain steadfast at the
top of this generation.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I advance my pieces onward to the
Japanese Derby, a fitting venue to further bolster
my name!
